characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Shoulder-length wavy blonde hair. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Grey turtleneck sweater. Black over-ear headphones.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अगर आप इस साल सच में English बोलना सीखना चाहते हैं, तो ये आपके लिए है। [If you truly want to learn to speak English this year, this is for you.]
Character A says: सिर्फ grammar रटने वाले नहीं, बल्कि वो जो असल में बात करना चाहते हैं। [Not just those who memorize grammar, but those who actually want to converse.]
Character A says: ज़्यादातर apps आपको सिर्फ tap और swipe करना सिखाते हैं। [Most apps just teach you to tap and swipe.]
Character A says: वो आपको points देते हैं, confidence नहीं। [They give you points, not confidence.]
Character A says: महीनों बीत जाते हैं, पर real life में आप जवाब नहीं दे पाते। [Months go by, but you can't respond in real life.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks serious learners who want to speak, not just play games.
- Highlights the problem with traditional apps (points vs real conversations).
- Relates to the frustration of not being able to respond in real life.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सच में English बोलना सीखें
Not just for 'trying',
Actually Speak
No more tap & swipe
Points ≠ Confidence
Real life conversations

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: इसीलिए Supernova बना है। यहाँ focus सिर्फ एक चीज़ पर है: Speaking practice. [That's why Supernova was built. Here the focus is on just one thing: Speaking practice.]
Character A says: आप Day 1 से real-world situations में बात करते हैं, जैसे interview या office में। [You speak in real-world situations from Day 1, like in an interview or at the office.]
Character A says: हमारा AI tutor आपकी grammar और pronunciation तुरंत सही करता है, बिना किसी judgement के। [Our AI tutor instantly corrects your grammar and pronunciation, without any judgement.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution focused on speaking practice.
- Highlights real-world scenarios like interviews and office talk.
- Mentions the AI tutor for instant, non-judgmental feedback.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
>> Supernova App
Focus: Speaking Practice
Speak Day One
Real-world situations (Interview, Office)
AI Tutor Feedback
Instant correction without judgement

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: देखिए क्या होता है जब आप रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट practice करते हैं। [See what happens when you practice for just 15 minutes a day.]
Character A says: Week 1: आपकी झिझक खत्म होती है और आप डरना छोड़ देते हैं। [Week 1: Your hesitation ends and you stop being afraid.]
Character A says: Week 2: आपका दिमाग Hindi से English translate करना बंद कर देता है। [Week 2: Your brain stops translating from Hindi to English.]
Character A says: Week 4: आप बिना अटके, पूरे confidence के साथ English में बात करने लगते हैं। [Week 4: You start speaking in English fluently, with full confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Sets a realistic expectation of 15 minutes a day.
- Outlines a clear, believable 4-week progression.
- Focuses on building confidence and stopping mental translation rather than unrealistic 'native' claims.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Just 15 minutes a day
In week 1:
Lose hesitation & fear of mistakes
In week 2:
Stop translating Hindi to English
In week 4:
Confident, fluent conversations

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अपनी English को अपनी कमज़ोरी मत बनने दीजिए। [Don't let your English become your weakness.]
Character A says: अगर आप अपने career और confidence को बढ़ाना चाहते हैं, तो आज ही शुरुआत करें। [If you want to boost your career and confidence, start today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers an encouraging call to action.
- Connects English speaking to career and confidence growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Start Today
Don't let English be your weakness
Boost your career & confidence

scenes.scene_summary: - Standard end card with brand logo and download prompt.
